case_title: PORTILLO, SONIA VS ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTILLO, SONIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR VALASQUEZ, SIDNEY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,540.00, SIDNEY VELASQUEZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
